svg.title: Failsafe Blocked Context To Diag Path Signal Flow

g.text: Failsafe Blocked Context To Diag Path Signal Flow
1. TEST_SCN forces a blocked fail-safe condition
2. CGW owns fail-safe mode and warning-path downgrade
3. Gateway state is mirrored into diag/info surfaces
4. TEST_SCN captures blocked-context evidence and verdict anchors
